Battle\n(Warlocks only).name: Destructor
Battle\n(Warlocks only).effect: The target suffers four automatic hits with S:7 AP:-2 D:1, AT(1), Seeking.

Battle\n(Warlocks only).name: Conceal
Battle\n(Warlocks only).effect: The target gains the benefit of cover.

Battle\n(Warlocks only).name: Empower
Battle\n(Warlocks only).effect: The target receives +1 Strength and the "Decimate" ability for melee attacks.

Battle\n(Warlocks only).name: Jinx
Battle\n(Warlocks only).effect: The target worsens its Saving throw or Armor value by -1.

Battle\n(Warlocks only).name: Protect
Battle\n(Warlocks only).effect: The target improves its Saving throw or Armor value by +1.

Battle\n(Warlocks only).name: Reveal
Battle\n(Warlocks only).effect: The target loses the benefit of cover.

Fate\n(Farseers only).name: Will of Asuryan
Fate\n(Farseers only).effect: The unit gains the "Fearless" and "Objective secured!" abilities.

Fate\n(Farseers only).name: Doom
Fate\n(Farseers only).effect: All attacks against the target gain the "Decimate" and "Armorbane" abilities.

Fate\n(Farseers only).name: Eldritch storm
Fate\n(Farseers only).effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with S: 10 AP: -2 D: 1; AT(3), Barrage, Seeking, Suppression.

Fate\n(Farseers only).name: Executioner
Fate\n(Farseers only).effect: The target suffers three automatic hits with S: 8 AP: -3 D: 2; AT(2), Seeking.

Fate\n(Farseers only).name: Fortune
Fate\n(Farseers only).effect: The target receives a 4+ invulnerability save.

Fate\n(Farseers only).name: Guide
Fate\n(Farseers only).effect: The target receives a +1 bonus to all hit rolls.

Revenant\n(Ynnari only).name: Storm of Whispers
Revenant\n(Ynnari only).effect: Every enemy model within range must make two dangerous terrain tests.

Revenant\n(Ynnari only).name: Ancestor's Grace
Revenant\n(Ynnari only).effect: All attacks of the target gain "Decimate" and (cumulative) "Lance(1)".

Revenant\n(Ynnari only).name: Gaze of Ynnead
Revenant\n(Ynnari only).effect: If the target unit consists of creatures, it suffers 1D6 automatic wounds with S: 10 DS: -3 D: 1; Seeking. Vehicles suffer 1D3 penetrating hits; AT(2), Seeking.

Revenant\n(Ynnari only).name: Shield of Ynnead
Revenant\n(Ynnari only).effect: The target receives a 4+ invulnerability save.

Revenant\n(Ynnari only).name: Unbind Souls
Revenant\n(Ynnari only).effect: Attacks against the target gain the "Precision(5+)" and "Shield breaker(-1)" abilities.

Revenant\n(Ynnari only).name: Word of the Phoenix
Revenant\n(Ynnari only).effect: The model may heal a friendly Eldar unit (excluding itself and <Wraith> units) within range for 3 wounds. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.

Wraith\n(Wraithseer only).name: Enliven
Wraith\n(Wraithseer only).effect: The target gains the "Battle Focus" ability and +1 Initiative.

Wraith\n(Wraithseer only).name: Deliverance
Wraith\n(Wraithseer only).effect: The target unit regains 1 lost wound. Dead models may be revived with this. Living models have to be healed completly first.

Wraith\n(Wraithseer only).name: Foreboding
Wraith\n(Wraithseer only).effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with S:5 AP:-1 D:1, Barrage, Seeking, Suppression.
